intro: Google has restricted Meta's access to its Gemini AI models due to insufficient computing capacity to meet Meta's demands, according to reports. Ford has rehired experienced engineers after discovering that AI alone could not deliver the product quality the company expected. Chinese chipmaker Basic Semiconductor is moving toward an IPO as AI data centers strain infrastructure, while researchers warn that AI chatbots can reinforce delusional thinking through amplification spirals.

whitelist.desc: Meta had sought more computing capacity than Google could provide, the Financial Times reports.
